The daily coverage of the war in Iran, now in its sixth week, has at times been reduced to an unjustly sterilized portrayal of the regional crisis, characterized by tallies of drone interceptions, strikes, down-trending stock tickers, and diplomatic maneuvering, while erasing any sense of the immense humanitarian catastrophe that continues to unfold.
